headline: S&P 500 Gains on Tech Rally, Up 1.2% YTD Despite Fed Rate Uncertainty
analysis: US equity markets extend gains driven by strong tech performance (Nvidia, Tesla beating expectations). S&P 500 trading near 5,800 level. Positive earnings surprise momentum offsetting Fed rate pause concerns. Financial sector strength (+0.53%) supports confidence.

headline: Euro Weakens to 1.048 vs USD Amid ECB Speculation on Spring Rate Cuts
analysis: EUR/USD slides through 1.05 on expectations ECB will cut rates in March following inflation cooling. Analysts see potential for 50bp cuts if disinflation continues. USD strength supported by higher-for-longer US rate expectations.

headline: DAX Index Rises 0.8%, Supported by Automotive and Industrial Earnings Beat
analysis: German DAX reaches 19,200 level on strong results from Siemens, BMW, Volkswagen. Industrial production data shows surprising resilience. German economic sentiment improving despite eurozone rate cut bets. CAC 40 and STOXX 50 follow with modest gains.

headline: Bitcoin Surges to $96,500 on Institutional Demand, Eyes $100K Psychological Level
analysis: Bitcoin rallies +4.2% on the day, approaching $100k milestone. Ethereum +2.8% at $3,650. Spot Bitcoin ETF inflows accelerate ($850M today). Corporate adoption rhetoric from tech CEOs fueling retail FOMO. Short-term volatility risk elevated.

headline: Gold Holds Above $2,120/oz as USD Strength Pressures Precious Metals
analysis: Gold trading sideways at $2,120-2,140 range. While ECB rate cut hopes support gold (lower rates reduce opportunity cost), USD strength limits upside. Silver -0.3% at $26.50. Geopolitical tensions provide floor under prices. Central bank buying continues steady.

headline: PayPal Earnings Crush Estimates with +6.7% Gain, Digital Payments Sector Rallies
analysis: PayPal (PYPL) surges 6.7% after beating Q4 earnings by 18%, guiding FY2026 revenue growth 12-14%. Gross payment volume growth accelerates 9.1% YoY. Digital payments renaissance narrative supports sector. Square, Stripe sentiment strengthens.

headline: Fed Decision Watch: Market Prices 25bp Cut in May, Powell to Speak Thursday
analysis: Fed Funds futures show 35% probability of May rate cut. Powell speaks Thursday at Jackson Hole conference (virtual). Market parsing inflation data and labor report for clues. 2Y yield at 3.85%, 10Y at 3.92%. Policy divergence US vs. eurozone creating forex volatility.

headline: Earnings Season Momentum: Tech, Industrials Beat, Healthcare Struggles
analysis: Q4 earnings beat rate: 72% of S&P 500 companies beat estimates. Tech +8.2% avg beat, Industrials +5.1%. Healthcare -2.3% below estimates (Pfizer, Merck concerns). Consumer Cyclical strong (+1.63% daily). Guidance focus shifts to 2026 AI capex trends.
